text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy I'm shaking! This is amazing!
choice_data_list:
You'll be shaking even more if you win next
time too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy I'm shaking! This is amazing!
choice_data_list:
You'll be shaking even more if you win next

You'll be shaking even more if you win next

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Are you trying to compete with me? I'm the one
who should be happy!
choice_data_list: In my heart, we ran together!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, I won't ruin it for you this time. Seeing you
happy makes me excited!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What? It's not like I want to be shaking.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I know. You mean I'll feel even more
excited.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And yeah, I think so too. I want to win more!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wild. I'm already so excited about the next race. I
hope you'll pick me out a good one!
